case_title: LEE, EUGENE A. VS MANGAOANG, NESS OWNER BAYVIEW ENG/CONTRACTORS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY LEE, EUGENE A. AS TO DEFENDANT MANGAOANG, NESS OWNER BAYVIEW ENG/CONTRACTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, EUGENE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANGAOANG, NESS OWNER BAYVIEW ENG/CONTRACTORS $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,821.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO NESS P. MANGAOANG PRES & OWNER BAYVIEW ENGINEERS & CONTRACTOR RETURNED SIGNED.
